contracts.title: Limit concurrent management sessions

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys httpd max-clients 10; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266064

contracts.title: Terminate shared/group account credentials when members leave the group

remediation.note: Evaluate shared/group accounts from user list. Remediation requires manual user deletion.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh delete auth user <shared_account>; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266065

contracts.title: Configure only one local account of last resort for emergency access

remediation.note: Count local accounts; only one account of last resort should remain. Remediation requires manual user deletion.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh delete auth user <extra_account>; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266066

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to assign appropriate user roles or access levels to authenticated users.

remediation.note: Manual review required. The canonical STIG requires appropriate remote-role and local partition-access assignments, but the appropriate role/access level is organization-defined and cannot be auto-derived from the STIG text alone.

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must be assigned an organization-defined appropriate role
must be assigned organization-defined appropriate partition access

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266067

contracts.title: Audit execution of privileged functions including account changes

criteria.not_a_finding: sys_daemon_log_tmm_os_log_level == 'informational' AND sys_daemon_log_tmm_ssl_log_level == 'informational' AND sys_daemon_log_mcpd_audit == 'enabled' AND sys_daemon_log_mcpd_log_level == 'notice' AND sys_db_log_ssl_level == 'informational'
criteria.open: sys_daemon_log_tmm_os_log_level != 'informational' OR sys_daemon_log_tmm_ssl_log_level != 'informational' OR sys_daemon_log_mcpd_audit != 'enabled' OR sys_daemon_log_mcpd_log_level != 'notice' OR sys_db_log_ssl_level != 'informational'

tmsh_commands: tmsh list sys daemon-log-settings tmm os-log-level
tmsh list sys daemon-log-settings tmm ssl-log-level
tmsh list sys daemon-log-settings mcpd audit
tmsh list sys daemon-log-settings mcpd log-level
tmsh list sys db log.ssl.level value

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys daemon-log-settings tmm os-log-level informational; tmsh modify sys daemon-log-settings tmm ssl-log-level informational; tmsh modify sys daemon-log-settings mcpd audit enabled; tmsh modify sys daemon-log-settings mcpd log-level notice; tmsh modify sys db log.ssl.level value informational; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266068

contracts.title: Enforce limit of 3 consecutive invalid logon attempts with 15-minute lockout

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth password-policy max-login-failures 3; tmsh modify auth password-policy lockout-duration 900; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266069

contracts.title: Display Standard Mandatory DoD Notice and Consent Banner on TMOS User Interface

payload.bannerText: You are accessing a U.S. Government (USG) Information System (IS)...

payload.guiSecurityBannerText: You are accessing a U.S. Government (USG) Information System (IS)...

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys sshd banner enabled; tmsh modify sys global-settings gui-security-banner enabled; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266070

contracts.title: Manage local audit storage capacity per organization-defined requirements

remediation.note: Configure log rotation frequency, age-based removal, archive copies, and alertd message conditions per organization requirements. Automated configuration depends on organization-defined storage thresholds.

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266074

contracts.title: Generate audit records and send to redundant central syslog servers

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys syslog remote-servers add { stig_syslog1 { host <ip1> remote-port 514 } stig_syslog2 { host <ip2> remote-port 514 } }; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266075

contracts.title: Configure redundant authoritative NTP time sources

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys ntp servers add { <ntp_server1> <ntp_server2> }; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Use UTC timestamps for consistent forensic analysis

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys ntp timezone UTC; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Verify software image signatures before installation

remediation.note: Enable software image signature verification before installing BIG-IP updates.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify /sys db liveinstall.checksig value "enable"

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must equal organization-defined software signature verification value

contracts.title: Configure redundant authentication servers for availability and security
tmsh_commands: tmsh list auth tacacs system-auth all-properties

remediation.note: Configure at least two TACACS+ authentication servers. The PATCH sets auth source type; servers must be configured separately.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth source type tacacs

contracts.title: Run a supported BIG-IP TMOS software version with current security patches

remediation.note: Upgrade to a supported BIG-IP TMOS version with current security patches. Automated upgrade is not supported.

contracts.title: Use certificates from an approved DoD certificate authority

remediation.note: Obtain and install certificates from a DoD-approved PKI Certificate Authority. Automated certificate procurement is not supported.

contracts.title: Prohibit unnecessary and nonsecure functions, ports, protocols, and services

remediation.note: Disable enabled virtual servers that expose prohibited or restricted listener ports until they can be reconfigured to approved services only.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate enabled LTM virtual servers only. Treat the control as policy-clean when no enabled virtual servers exist. A finding exists when any enabled listener exposes a prohibited or restricted destination port from the organization service policy.

contracts.title: Use multifactor authentication (PKI-based) for management logins

remediation.note: Configure PKI-based multifactor authentication for all management access.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth source type tacacs

contracts.title: Authenticate NTP sources using cryptographically-based authentication

remediation.note: Configure cryptographic NTP authentication with shared keys on all NTP servers and clients.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: echo '1 M <key> #MD5 Key' > /etc/ntp/keys; tmsh edit sys ntp all-properties; tmsh save sys config

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must contain organization-defined NTP authentication directives

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266086

contracts.title: Enforce minimum 15-character password length

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth password-policy min-length 15 policy-enforcement enabled; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Require at least one uppercase character in passwords

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth password-policy required-uppercase 1; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Require at least one lowercase character in passwords

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth password-policy required-lowercase 1; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Require at least one numeric character in passwords

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth password-policy required-numeric 1; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Require at least one special character in passwords

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify auth password-policy required-special 1; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Enforce password change differences (at least 8 characters different)

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys db password.difok value 8; tmsh save sys config

contracts.title: Limit cached authenticator lifetime (OCSP max age)
tmsh_commands: tmsh list apm aaa ocsp all-properties

remediation.note: Configure the OCSP Response Max Age to organization-defined value.

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must equal organization-defined OCSP max age

contracts.title: Use DoD-approved OCSP responders or CRLs for PKI certificate validation
tmsh_commands: tmsh list apm aaa ocsp all-properties

remediation.note: Configure the OCSP Responder to point to a DoD-approved URL. Requires organization-specific URL.

contracts.title: Automatically terminate idle administrative sessions within 300 seconds

criteria.not_a_finding: sys_httpd_auth_pam_idle_timeout > 0 AND sys_httpd_auth_pam_idle_timeout <= 300 AND sys_httpd_auth_pam_dashboard_timeout == true AND sys_global_settings_console_inactivity_timeout > 0 AND sys_global_settings_console_inactivity_timeout <= 300 AND cli_global_settings_idle_timeout > 0 AND cli_global_settings_idle_timeout <= 5 AND sys_sshd_inactivity_timeout > 0 AND sys_sshd_inactivity_timeout <= 300
criteria.open: sys_httpd_auth_pam_idle_timeout == 0 OR sys_httpd_auth_pam_idle_timeout > 300 OR sys_httpd_auth_pam_dashboard_timeout != true OR sys_global_settings_console_inactivity_timeout == 0 OR sys_global_settings_console_inactivity_timeout > 300 OR cli_global_settings_idle_timeout == 0 OR cli_global_settings_idle_timeout > 5 OR sys_sshd_inactivity_timeout == 0 OR sys_sshd_inactivity_timeout > 300

remediation.note: Set cli global-settings idle-timeout 5 via tmsh and persist configuration after REST changes.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys httpd auth-pam-idle-timeout 300 auth-pam-dashboard-timeout on; tmsh modify sys global-settings console-inactivity-timeout 300; tmsh modify cli global-settings idle-timeout 5; tmsh modify sys sshd inactivity-timeout 300; tmsh save sys config

sources.title: STIG Viewer - F5 BIG-IP TMOS NDM V-266095

sources.maintainer_note: Authoritative override replaces prior incorrect local mapping to sys snmp sys-location.

contracts.title: Perform regular configuration backups for recoverability

remediation.note: Perform weekly or organization-defined UCS configuration backups and store them on a separate system. Automated backup scheduling is external to BIG-IP.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance providing user access control intermediary services must limit the number of concurrent sessions to one or an organization-defined number for each access profile.

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify apm profile access <name> max-concurrent-users <limit>

contracts.title: Monitor remote access traffic with application security policies

remediation.note: Attach an Application Security Policy to remote-access virtual servers. Selection of the correct ASM policy requires organizational context.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance providing intermediary services for remote access must use FIPS-validated cryptographic algorithms, including TLS 1.2 at a minimum.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list ltm profile client-ssl all-properties

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify ltm profile client-ssl <name> options { no-sslv2 no-sslv3 no-tlsv1 no-tlsv1.1 } ciphers "ECDHE+AES-GCM:DHE+AES-GCM:ECDHE+AES:DHE+AES"

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate only client-ssl profiles attached to active virtual servers. If none are attached, treat the control as not applicable/policy-clean rather than forcing /Common/clientssl.

contracts.title: To protect against data mining, the F5 BIG-IP appliance providing content filtering must prevent code injection attacks from being launched against data storage objects, including, at a minimum, databases, database records, queries, and fields.

remediation.note: Set the Application Security Policy enforcement mode to Blocking and enforce the XPath Injection and LDAP Injection attack signatures before applying the policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate selected ASM policies by current enforcement mode and required signature-set enforcement for the named injection protections.

contracts.title: To protect against data mining, the F5 BIG-IP appliance providing content filtering must prevent code injection attacks launched against application objects including, at a minimum, application URLs and application code.

remediation.note: Set the Application Security Policy enforcement mode to Blocking and enforce the Buffer Overflow and Server Side Code Injection attack signatures before applying the policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate selected ASM policies by current enforcement mode and required signature-set enforcement for the named code-injection protections.

contracts.title: To protect against data mining, the F5 BIG-IP appliance providing content filtering must prevent SQL injection attacks launched against data storage objects, including, at a minimum, databases, database records, and database fields.

remediation.note: Set the Application Security Policy enforcement mode to Blocking and enforce all SQL-Injection attack signatures before applying the policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate selected ASM policies by current enforcement mode and required signature-set enforcement for SQL injection protections.

contracts.title: Enforce identity-, role-, or attribute-based authorization policies in APM access policy

remediation.note: Configure source address restrictions on virtual servers or use AFM firewall policies.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify ltm virtual <name> source <allowed_network/mask>

contracts.title: Implement traffic inspection and information flow controls via firewall policies
tmsh_commands: tmsh list security firewall policy all-properties

remediation.note: Configure enforced AFM Network Firewall policies and active rules so approved information flows are inspected.

contracts.title: Display Standard Mandatory DoD Notice and Consent Banner in APM access policy

remediation.note: Insert a Message Box item that references the selected access profile customization group so the DoD notice and consent banner is displayed before access is granted.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Consider the banner configured when the policy graph contains a message-box agent with a referenced customization group.

contracts.title: Generate event log records forwarded to centralized events log (Access System Logs)
tmsh_commands: tmsh list apm profile access all-properties

remediation.note: Enable Access System Logs in the default-log-setting, set the log items to Notice, and ensure the default-log-setting is selected on the APM Access Profile Logs tab.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with scope profile. Access System Logs are compliant when each selected profile references a log setting and the referenced access log entries are enabled at notice level.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance that provides intermediary services for SMTP must inspect inbound and outbound SMTP and Extended SMTP communications traffic for protocol compliance and protocol anomalies.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list ltm profile smtp all-properties

remediation.note: Enable protocol security on SMTP profiles that are attached to active virtual servers.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate SMTP profiles attached to active virtual servers. If none are attached, treat the control as policy-clean.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance that provides intermediary services for FTP must inspect inbound and outbound FTP communications traffic for protocol compliance and protocol anomalies.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list ltm profile ftp all-properties

remediation.note: Enable protocol security on FTP profiles that are attached to active virtual servers.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate FTP profiles attached to active virtual servers. If none are attached, treat the control as policy-clean.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance that provides intermediary services for HTTP must inspect inbound and outbound HTTP traffic for protocol compliance and protocol anomalies.

remediation.note: Enable alarm/block enforcement for the HTTP protocol compliance failed ASM blocking violation on each scoped policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate scoped ASM policies present on the device. The control is satisfied when the HTTP protocol compliance failed violation is alarmed or blocked on each scoped policy.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to prohibit or restrict the use of unnecessary or prohibited functions, ports, protocols, and/or services, including those defined in the PPSM CAL and vulnerability assessments.

remediation.note: Disable enabled virtual servers that expose prohibited or restricted listener ports until they can be reconfigured to approved services only.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate enabled LTM virtual servers only. Treat the control as policy-clean when no enabled virtual servers exist. A finding exists when any enabled listener exposes a prohibited or restricted destination port from the organization service policy.

contracts.title: Require reauthentication when privilege level changes or session conditions change

remediation.note: Update each attached per-request access policy to use a gated subroutine so step-up authentication can rerun when access conditions change.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate active virtual servers with an attached APM per-request access policy. If no active per-request access policies are attached, treat the control as policy-clean. Each attached per-request access policy must define subroutine properties with a gating criteria that is not blank and not the once-per-session defaults.

contracts.title: Use redundant authentication servers and multifactor authentication in APM access policy

remediation.note: Insert a server-backed primary AAA item and a distinct MFA-capable AAA item into each selected APM access policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Each selected policy must include a server-backed primary AAA authentication item and a distinct MFA-capable AAA authentication item.

contracts.title: Validate machine certificate revocation status in APM access policy

remediation.note: Insert Machine Cert Auth plus OCSP validation into each selected APM access policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Each selected policy must include Machine Cert Auth and a machine-certificate revocation validation step using OCSP or CRLDP.

contracts.title: Maintain local revocation cache for PKI-based user authentication

remediation.note: Insert OCSP validation backed by a cached OCSP responder configuration so revocation data remains available when live checks are temporarily unreachable.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Each selected policy must include revocation validation backed by a locally cached OCSP or CRLDP configuration for PKI-based user authentication.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must terminate all network connections associated with a communications session at the end of the session or after 15 minutes of inactivity.

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify apm profile access <name> inactivity-timeout 900

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance providing content filtering must employ rate-based attack prevention behavior analysis.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list security dos profile all-properties

remediation.note: Ensure each non-default custom DoS profile has a managed network DoS subprofile with dynamic signatures enabled and at least one network attack vector set to mitigate.

network_attack_vector.name: udp-flood
network_attack_vector.tmsh_clause: state mitigate threshold-mode fully-automatic enforce enabled auto-threshold enabled

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate custom DoS profiles and ignore the default /Common/dos baseline profile.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance providing content filtering must protect against or limit the effects of known and unknown types of denial-of-service (DoS) attacks by employing pattern recognition pre-processors.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list security dos profile all-properties

remediation.note: Ensure each non-default custom DoS profile has managed network and protocol-dns subprofiles with dynamic signatures detection enabled.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate custom DoS profiles and ignore the default /Common/dos baseline profile.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must check the validity of all data inputs except those specifically identified by the organization.

remediation.note: Enable metachar validation on the wildcard parameter for each ASM security policy so parameter names and values are validated.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate ASM security policies present on the device. Parameter validation is satisfied when each scoped policy's wildcard parameter validates metacharacters in both parameter names and values.

contracts.title: Enable automatic security signature updates with real-time installation

remediation.note: Set Automatic Update Check to Enabled. Configure Real-Time installation of automatically downloaded updates under Live Update.
commands: modify sys software update auto-check enabled
modify sys software update auto-phonehome enabled

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance providing content filtering must detect use of network services that have not been authorized or approved by the information system security manager (ISSM) and information system security officer (ISSO), at a minimum.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list security log profile global-network

commands: modify security log profile global-network { classification enabled }

remediation.note: Attach a classification policy to scoped firewall rules and enable Classification logging with a log publisher on the global-network logging profile.

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must equal organization-defined classification logging state
lawful_rows.lawful_source: tmsh list security log profile global-network

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must be configured with a log publisher
lawful_rows.lawful_source: tmsh list security log profile global-network

contracts.title: Log unauthorized services via global-network logging profile with Classification enabled
tmsh_commands: tmsh list security log profile global-network

remediation.note: Enable Classification logging and set a log publisher on the global-network logging profile.
commands: modify security log profile global-network { classification enabled }

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must equal organization-defined classification logging state
lawful_rows.lawful_source: tmsh list security log profile global-network

lawful_rows.admissible_constraint: must be configured with a log publisher
lawful_rows.lawful_source: tmsh list security log profile global-network

contracts.title: Enable HTTP Only flag on APM access profile session cookies

remediation.note: Enable the HTTP Only flag in the Access Profile SSO/Auth Domains cookie options.

contracts.title: Enable Secure flag on APM access profile session cookies

remediation.note: Enable the Secure flag in the Access Profile SSO/Auth Domains cookie options.

contracts.title: Disable persistent cookies in APM access profile Cookie Options

remediation.note: Disable persistent cookies on each APM access profile.

contracts.title: Validate user certificate revocation status in APM access policy

remediation.note: Insert Client Cert Inspection plus OCSP validation into each selected APM access policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Each selected policy must include Client Cert Inspection and a user-certificate revocation validation step using OCSP or CRLDP.

contracts.title: Disable On-Demand Cert Auth; use Client Cert Inspection instead

remediation.note: Replace On-Demand Cert Auth with Client Cert Inspection in each selected APM access policy.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Each selected policy must include Client Cert Inspection and must not include On-Demand Cert Auth.

contracts.title: Enforce consistent IP address per session to prevent session hijacking

remediation.note: Enable the BIG-IP System Preferences control that requires a consistent inbound IP for the entire management web session.
remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify sys httpd auth-pam-validate-ip on

contracts.title: Restrict session to single client IP in APM access profile

remediation.note: Restrict each APM session to a single client IP address.

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to set a Maximum Session Timeout value of eight hours or less.

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify apm profile access <name> max-session-timeout 28800

contracts.title: The F5 BIG-IP appliance must be configured to use cryptographic algorithms approved by NSA to protect NSS for remote access to a classified network.
tmsh_commands: tmsh list ltm profile client-ssl all-properties

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify ltm profile client-ssl <name> ciphers "ECDHE+AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE+AES128-GCM-SHA256"

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate only client-ssl profiles attached to active virtual servers. If none are attached, treat the control as policy-clean. Accept FIPS:!SSLv3:!TLSv1:!TLSv1_1 on TMOS 17.5.1.3 as compliant strong-cipher evidence.

contracts.title: Authenticate endpoint devices via APM per-session policy

remediation.note: Insert Machine Cert Auth into each selected APM access policy to authenticate endpoint devices.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate APM access profiles with an assigned access policy. Each selected policy must include Machine Cert Auth to authenticate endpoint devices before access is allowed.

contracts.title: Disable split tunneling to prevent backdoor network access
tmsh_commands: tmsh list apm resource network-access all-properties

remediation.note: Disable split tunneling and clear tunnel bypass settings for every APM Network Access resource.

organization_policy.evaluation_scope: Evaluate all configured APM Network Access resources. Treat the control as policy-clean when none exist. Each resource must have split tunneling disabled with no local subnet, local DNS, IPv4 exclude, or IPv6 exclude bypass configured.

contracts.title: Route traffic to IDPS via Protocol Inspection Profile on virtual servers

remediation.note: Enable Protocol Inspection Profile on virtual servers.

contracts.title: Use Always-On VPN or machine tunnel to prevent unsecured access

remediation.note: Enable Always-On VPN or machine tunnel in APM connectivity profile. Requires organizational policy for VPN mode.

contracts.title: Limit concurrent sessions per IP to 10 or organization-defined number

remediation.tmsh_equivalent: tmsh modify apm profile access <name> max-sessions-per-client-ip 10
